## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Run command `...`
2. See error

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 🖥️ Environment

- Java version: (run `java --version`)
- Maven version: (run `mvn --version`)
- Ollama model: (e.g. llama3, mistral)
